objective: Stop incremental support-bank tuning and launch AVA-v2 as a recurrent-depth plus verifier-RL architecture branch.

research_basis.paper: Scaling up Test-Time Compute with Latent Reasoning: A Recurrent Depth Approach
From RAG to Memory: Non-Parametric Continual Learning for Large Language Models
RAFT: Adapting Language Model to Domain Specific RAG
In-Context Reinforcement Learning for Tool Use in Large Language Models

implemented.recurrent_depth_architecture: shared recurrent block with prelude/coda scaffold, step embeddings, config support, and budget estimation
implemented.verifiable_rl: grouped REINFORCE/GRPO-style scaffold for math/tool tasks with transparent reward logs

decision: Promote AVA-v2 recurrent-depth plus verifier RL as the new architecture branch. Stop treating support-bank point gains as the mainline research path.
next_step: Run a longer recurrent-depth unsupervised pretraining job on a real mixed corpus, then warm-start verifier RL from that checkpoint instead of from the old transformer checkpoint.
